# The Road to Glory

> An interactive radial bracket visualizing every FIFA World Cup knockout
> stage from 1986 through 2026. Built as a client-rendered single-page app
> (React + TypeScript); this file exists because the rendered page requires
> JavaScript execution to show its content to a crawler.

## What this site is

A single page presenting one FIFA World Cup tournament's knockout bracket at
a time, selectable via a year timeline (1986–2026). For each tournament it
shows: host nation, champion, and the full knockout tree (Round of 16 through
the Final, or Round of 32 through the Final for 2026's expanded 48-team
format), with real historical scores, penalty-shootout results, and
extra-time notes where applicable.

## Data provenance

- 1986–2022: real historical results, entered manually.
- 2026: fetched from the free, public REST API at https://worldcup26.ir
  (source: https://github.com/rezarahiminia/worldcup2026), which provides
  fixtures, scores, and explicit bracket-feed labels (e.g. "Winner Match 74")
  for the 48-team format. Matches not yet played show as pending; the bracket
  updates as results come in.

## Key facts an agent answering questions about this site should know

- Format changed in 2026: 48 teams (up from 32), adding a Round of 32 before
  the traditional Round of 16.
- The bracket is circular/radial, not a traditional left-to-right tree:
  16 outer leaves (Round of 16 participants) converge toward a central
  trophy through Quarter-final and Semi-final rings.
- Interactions (hovering a flag, clicking a match) are JavaScript-driven and
  will not be visible to a crawler that does not execute JS.

## Contact / source

This is an independent hobby project, not an official FIFA product.
